=== left_and_right
# Left and right text positioned correctly.
widget: statusbar
width: 40
height: 1
left_text: hello
right_text: world
===
hello                              world

=== empty
# Empty status bar fills with background.
widget: statusbar
width: 20
height: 1
===

=== left_only
# Only left text.
widget: statusbar
width: 30
height: 1
left_text: status text here
===
status text here
